# Support

## Where to Ask Questions

For usage and learning questions about this repository:

- Open a GitHub Discussion (recommended)
- If Discussions are not enabled, open an issue using the question label

## What Belongs in Issues

Use issues for:

- reproducible bugs
- documentation problems
- concrete feature requests

Avoid opening issues for broad, open-ended Rust learning questions that are not specific to this repository.

## Security Issues

Do not report security vulnerabilities in public issues.

See SECURITY.md for reporting guidance.
